company_name: Holly Days Nursery, Garden Center, & Landscaping
tagline: Your Award-Winning Nursery, Garden Center, & Landscaping Destination Since 1994

hero.headline:
Your Landscape Dreams Rooted in
32 Years of Expertise
hero.subheadline: From a seven-acre nursery with the region's largest plant selection to award-winning landscape design, Holly Days has been transforming outdoor spaces across the Delaware Valley since 1994. Let our degreed horticulturists and certified technicians bring your vision to life.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Nursery, Landscaping<br class="hidden md:block"> & Outdoor Living
services.subtitle: From selecting the perfect plant to designing your dream outdoor space, Holly Days handles every detail with degreed professionals and decades of hands-on experience.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Award-winning designers with 25+ years of expertise create custom planting plans, garden beds, grading, drainage solutions, and complete property transformations for homes and businesses.

cards.title: Hardscaping & Stonework
cards.description: ICPI-certified technicians build beautiful patios, walkways, retaining walls, steps, and outdoor living structures using natural stone, flagstone, and premium pavers.

cards.title: Nursery & Plant Selection
cards.description: Browse our 7-acre nursery featuring the region's largest selection of trees, shrubs, perennials, annuals, and tropicals. Our degreed horticulturists help you choose the right plant for every spot.

cards.title: Pond & Aquatics Center
cards.description: The area's largest water garden center. Custom koi ponds, waterfalls, fountains, aquatic plants, and seasonal pond maintenance from expert technicians.

cards.title: Delivery & Bulk Materials
cards.description: Convenient delivery of nursery products, bulk topsoil, mulch, natural stone, and landscape supplies direct to your property. Professional installation available.

cards.title: Garden Center & Supplies
cards.description: A full retail garden center with diverse plants, landscape supplies, natural stone, gardening tools, and accessories. Knowledgeable staff provides expert guidance year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your property and vision. Our award-winning designers will meet you on-site for a free, no-pressure consultation to explore possibilities and provide an honest estimate.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our team of degreed horticulturists and ICPI-certified technicians brings your plan to life — from sourcing the finest plant stock on our 13 acres to precision installation.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Step into a landscape that adds beauty, value, and joy to your property year after year. We stand behind every project and every plant we install.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Holly Days
about.headline: A Family-Owned Nursery Rooted in Quality Since 1994
about.description: When Torrey T. Rose acquired a small roadside nursery as a college student in 1994, he had a simple vision: provide the highest-quality plants and the most knowledgeable service in the Delaware Valley. Thirty-two years later, Holly Days has grown to 13 acres with a team of PLNA-certified horticulturists and award-winning designers — voted one of the Top 5 Landscapers in Philadelphia by CBS Philly.

features.title: Degreed Horticulture Team
features.description: Our professionals hold degrees from Delaware Valley College, Penn State, and Temple University — real expertise behind every recommendation.

features.title: Largest Selection in the Region
features.description: Seven acres of nursery stock plus six acres of growing fields mean we have the right plant for every project, grown under our quality control.

features.title: Award-Winning Results
features.description: Voted Top 5 Landscapers in Philadelphia by CBS Philly, with a 79% Superior Rating from Consumers' Checkbook and 4.8 stars on Houzz.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-quoted based on your property and goals. No hidden fees, no surprise charges — just honest pricing from a family business.

guarantee.headline: Our Plant & Workmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every plant, every stone, and every design. If any installation does not meet your expectations, our team will return and make it right at no additional cost. That is the Holly Days promise — quality you can count on, backed by 32 years of reputation.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my landscaping project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on scope and season. For urgent needs like drainage issues, we prioritize accordingly. Contact us and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you offer design services before I commit?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our award-winning designers offer free on-site consultations where we assess your property, discuss your vision, and provide preliminary ideas before any commitment.

faqs.question: What makes your nursery stock different?
faqs.answer: We grow many of our own plants on our 6-acre growing fields in Hilltown, PA and hand-select inventory from trusted growers. Our PLNA-certified horticulturists inspect every plant for health and quality before it reaches our 7-acre retail nursery.

faqs.question: Do you deliver mulch, topsoil, and stone?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer convenient delivery for all bulk materials including mulch, topsoil, natural stone, and more. Delivery is available throughout Montgomery County, Bucks County, and the surrounding Delaware Valley area.

faqs.question: Are your hardscape installers certified?
faqs.answer: Every hardscape technician on our team is ICPI-certified (Interlocking Concrete Pavement Institute). Combined with decades of experience, this ensures your patio, walkway, or retaining wall is built to last.

testimonials.name: Paul's Client
testimonials.text: Paul was professional and caring. The team from Holly Days did an amazing job taking care to ensure the aspects of our plan were carried out carefully and efficiently. The result exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Garden Center Visitor
testimonials.text: One of the best customer service experiences I have ever had in any industry. The staff is incredibly knowledgeable and truly passionate about helping you find the right plants. I plan to use Holly Days for all future projects.

testimonials.name: John's Client
testimonials.text: John and their customer service team quickly addressed my situation and went above and beyond in making sure I was satisfied. Beyond impressed with the selection — they have everything and are reliable.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a free, no-pressure consultation with our award-winning design team. We will visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide an honest quote.

footer.description: Family-owned nursery, garden center, and landscaping company serving the Delaware Valley since 1994.
